title: JavaScript Runtime, Tooling, and Evidence · Language Lens: Reproducible Environment
summary: Trace a small service-status script from source through parsing, execution, console evidence, and a user-visible result. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js reproducible environment increment in a reproducible service-status runtime notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Record runtime, module mode, inputs, locale, time, and dependency conditions needed to reproduce behavior.
Relate transformed output to authored source with source maps while verifying the actual shipped artifact.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
